verses.commentary: Concerning the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ and our being gathered to him identifies the topic. We ask you frames what follows as pastoral plea addressing confusion about Christ's return.

Not to become easily unsettled or alarmed guards against panic. By teaching allegedly from us warns of false attribution. Asserting that the day of the Lord has already come describes the false teaching: over-realized eschatology claiming Christ already returned.

Don't let anyone deceive you in any way emphasizes vigilance. For that day will not come until establishes preconditions. The rebellion occurs and the man of lawlessness is revealed identifies two prerequisite events. Doomed to destruction declares his certain end.

He will oppose and exalt himself over everything that is called God or is worshiped describes comprehensive blasphemy. So that he sets himself up in God's temple, proclaiming himself to be God depicts ultimate sacrilege and self-deification.
Don't you remember that when I was with you I used to tell you these things? appeals to prior teaching. Paul had explained this before, making their confusion more puzzling.

And now you know what is holding him back references something restraining the man of lawlessness. So that he may be revealed at the proper time shows divine control of timing. God's sovereignty governs even evil's manifestation.

The secret power of lawlessness is already at work reveals present activity of coming apostasy. But the one who now holds it back will continue to do so till he is taken out of the way identifies the restrainer, whose identity remains debated.

And then the lawless one will be revealed sequences events. Whom the Lord Jesus will overthrow with the breath of his mouth shows effortless victory. Destroy by the splendor of his coming depicts Christ's appearing as weapon. Light destroys darkness.

The coming of the lawless one will be in accordance with how Satan works reveals demonic empowerment. All sorts of displays of power through signs and wonders that serve the lie describes counterfeit miracles. Supernatural does not equal divine.

All the ways that wickedness deceives those who are perishing identifies comprehensive deception. They perish because they refused to love the truth and so be saved reveals the heart issue: not intellectual inability but willful rejection.

For this reason God sends them a powerful delusion describes judicial hardening. So that they will believe the lie shows God giving them over to what they chose. Rejected truth leads to embraced falsehood.

And so that all will be condemned who have not believed the truth but have delighted in wickedness states the outcome. Condemnation falls on unbelief joined with pleasure in evil. Heart and head both corrupted.

But we ought always to thank God for you contrasts believers with the deceived. Brothers and sisters loved by the Lord emphasizes divine affection. Because God chose you as firstfruits to be saved through the sanctifying work of the Spirit and through belief in the truth grounds salvation in election, Spirit's work, and faith.

He called you to this through our gospel links calling to proclamation. That you might share in the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ states purpose: participation in Christ's glory. Present calling aims at future glorification.

So then, brothers and sisters, stand firm draws conclusion. Hold fast to the teachings we passed on to you emphasizes tradition's importance. Whether by word of mouth or by letter validates both oral and written apostolic instruction.

May our Lord Jesus Christ himself and God our Father unites Son and Father as source. Who loved us and by his grace gave us eternal encouragement and good hope identifies gifts: encouragement and hope grounded in love and grace.
Encourage your hearts and strengthen you in every good deed and word prays for inner fortification producing outer faithfulness. Heart affects both action and speech.
